# jellyfin_library (Resource)

Manages a Jellyfin media library (virtual folder).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jellyfin_library" "movies" {
  name            = "Movies"
  collection_type = "movies"
  paths           = ["/media/movies"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `collection_type` (String) The collection type (e.g., `movies`, `tvshows`, `music`, `books`, `homevideos`, `boxsets`, `mixed`).
- `name` (String) The library name.
- `paths` (List of String) List of file system paths for this library.

### Optional

- `library_options_json` (String) Library options as a JSON string. Allows full customization of library settings.

### Read-Only

- `item_id` (String) The internal item ID assigned by Jellyfin.
